name: siyuan-agent-bridge
description: Private SiYuan personal knowledge-base adapter with a skill workflow and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Use a private SiYuan notebook as structured AI context.
interface.longDescription: Provides a skill workflow and MCP tools for reading a private local SiYuan knowledge base through safe indexes, notebook maps, and on-demand document reads.
defaultPrompt: Use my SiYuan notes for this task.
Check my personal knowledge base first.
Read relevant prior notes before planning.
